scripts.build: tsup --entry.tracker=src/index.ts --format iife,esm --minify --no-dts --out-dir dist --target es2017 && cp dist/tracker.global.js dist/tracker.min.js && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),zlib=require('zlib');const buf=fs.readFileSync('dist/tracker.min.js');zlib.gzip(buf,(e,r)=>{if(e)throw e;console.log('tracker.min.js gzipped size: '+r.length+' bytes');if(r.length>5120){console.error('ERROR: Exceeds 5KB gzip limit! ('+r.length+' bytes)');process.exit(1)}else{console.log('OK: Under 5KB limit')}})"
